allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/request -H "content-type: application/json" -d '{"feature":"smoke test request","priority":"P2","capacity":6}')
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Initial commit: Kanban Office — pixel-art multi-agent project planner *)

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; if \(Test-Path $gh\) { "found: $gh"; & $gh --version | Select-Object -First 1; "--- auth ---"; & $gh auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5 } else { "gh.exe not at default path"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Add in-app auto-updater \(GitHub Releases\) + multi-size app icon *)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 8)

PowerShell($env:Path += ";C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI"; git remote -v; "---"; git status -sb; "--- remote default branch ---"; gh repo view ronnielegaspi/kanban-office --json name,visibility,defaultBranchRef,url 2>&1)
PowerShell($gh="C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; if\(Test-Path $gh\){ & $gh release list --repo ronnielegaspi/kanban-office --limit 5 } else { Write-Output "gh not found at $gh" })

PowerShell(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\release.ps1 -Version 0.1.4 -Notes "Watchable roundtable: the team now gathers at the conference table and discusses live, with a new live Roundtable panel streaming each answer + the Manager's synthesis. Notion sync: push roundtables and notes/plan to your Notion, and pull auth-gated Notion docs into project context. App version now shown in the header. ARM installer renamed to KanbanOffice-Setup-arm64.exe.")

PowerShell(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\release.ps1 -Version 0.1.4 -Notes "Watchable roundtable: the team now gathers at the conference table and discusses live, with a new Roundtable panel streaming each answer and the Manager's synthesis. Notion sync: push roundtables and notes/plan to your Notion, and pull auth-gated Notion docs into project context. App version now shown in the header. ARM installer renamed to KanbanOffice-Setup-arm64.exe.")
Bash("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" release view v0.1.4 --json tagName,assets --jq '{tag: .tagName, assets: [.assets[] | {name: .name, size: .size}]}')

PowerShell(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\release.ps1 -Version 0.1.5 -Notes "Change an agent's model right from its detail page: AGENTS -> click an agent -> STATE -> MODEL dropdown, saved instantly. Works for the Manager too \(its model drives planning, roundtables and Notion runs\).")
Bash("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" release view v0.1.5 --json tagName,isLatest,assets --jq '{tag: .tagName, latest: .isLatest, assets: [.assets[].name]}')
Bash("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" release view v0.1.5 --json tagName,assets --jq '{tag: .tagName, assets: [.assets[].name]}')

PowerShell(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\release.ps1 -Version 0.1.6 -Notes "Terminal now has a Feature request mode that plans and delegates onto the board \(fixes requests that left the board empty\), plus an Ask mode and a STOP button to cancel a run. The Manager's terminal forwards feature requests the same way. Push to Notion is now date-grouped with real headings/bullets instead of a wall of text. New Options toggles to mute audio and stop desktop notifications.")

PowerShell(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\release.ps1 -Version 0.1.7 -Notes "Cleaner HUD: Overview, Board and Gantt are now one BOARD button with sub-tabs, and the live/offline chip moved to the footer. New EXPORT CSV on the board for JIRA / Notion / Sheets. The office board on the conference wall is bigger and task ids no longer spill into other columns.")
